Chapter.description: A self-contained portion of the video dedicated to a specific news story, topic, or theme with distinct introduction, development, and conclusion.

SegmentType.description: The short title or a short summary of the story or chapter.

Description.description: A five-word description of the scene. A scene is a smaller segment of the segment where a continuous block for storytelling unfolds within a specific time, place, and set of characters. A scene can only belong to a single chapter, and cannot overlap with other scenes. Scenes are sequential across the video.

StartTimestamp.description: the start timestamp of the scene

EndTimestamp.description: the end timestamp of the scene
